name: Penne with Peppers and Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sausage, Italian, cut into 2-inch lengths
2 Peppers, bell, red, cut into 1-inch cubes
2 Peppers, bell, yellow, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a skillet over moderate heat. Add sausage and cook until browned.
2. Remove sausage and drain on paper towels. Discard all but 3 tablespoons of fat.
3. Add onion to the remaining fat in the skillet and cook slowly until soft but not browned.
4. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute or two.
5. Add red and yellow bell peppers and toss with oil.
6. Add tomatoes, wine, Worcestershire sauce, and seasonings. Cook at a simmer, covered, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes. Add sausage pieces toward the end of this period.
7. Uncover and cook over high heat until reduced to the desired consistency.
8. Meanwhile, cook penne in ample boiling salted water until al dente. Drain pasta.
9. Toss pasta in a heated bowl with a tablespoon or so of good olive oil.
10. Serve pasta in heated bowls with sauce and a sprinkling of parsley.
